section_name: Inspection Only by Certain Inspection Stations
text:
A compulsory inspection under this chapter may be made only by an inspection station, except that the department may:

(1) permit inspection to be made by an inspector under terms and conditions the department prescribes;

(2) authorize the acceptance in this state of a certificate of inspection and approval issued in another state having a similar inspection law;

(3) authorize the acceptance in this state of a certificate of inspection and approval issued in compliance with 49 C.F.R. Part 396 to a motor bus, as defined by Section 502.001 (Definitions) , that is registered in this state but is not domiciled in this state; and

(4) authorize the acceptance in this state of a certificate of inspection and approval issued:

(A) by an inspector qualified under 49 C.F.R. Part 396 acting as an employee or authorized agent of the owner of a commercial fleet, as defined in Section 502.001 (Definitions) ; and

(B) to a motor vehicle or trailer that is:

(i) part of the fleet; and

(ii) registered or in the process of being registered in this state.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 548. Inspection of Vehicles
##### § 548.005 — Inspection Only by Certain Inspection Stations

A compulsory inspection under this chapter may be made only by an inspection station, except that the department may:

    (1) permit inspection to be made by an inspector under terms and conditions the department prescribes;

    (2) authorize the acceptance in this state of a certificate of inspection and approval issued in another state having a similar inspection law;

    (3) authorize the acceptance in this state of a certificate of inspection and approval issued in compliance with 49 C.F.R. Part 396 to a motor bus, as defined by Section 502.001 (Definitions) , that is registered in this state but is not domiciled in this state; and

    (4) authorize the acceptance in this state of a certificate of inspection and approval issued:

        (A) by an inspector qualified under 49 C.F.R. Part 396 acting as an employee or authorized agent of the owner of a commercial fleet, as defined in Section 502.001 (Definitions) ; and

        (B) to a motor vehicle or trailer that is:

            (i) part of the fleet; and

            (ii) registered or in the process of being registered in this state.

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 721 (S.B.1001), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2017.*

authorize the acceptance in this state of a certificate of inspection and approval issued in compliance with 49 C.F.R. Part 396 to a motor bus, as defined by Section 502.001 (Definitions) , that is registered in this state but is not domiciled in this state; and
authorize the acceptance in this state of a certificate of inspection and approval issued:

subsections.label: A

subsections.label: B

subsections.label: ii
